entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -
[info] loaded in 1.62 secs at 2026-05-21T13:12:27 - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1605331/000166357726000107/aera_10q022826.htm
[xule.buildIndexTime] Index build time 0:00:00.141893. - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1605331/000166357726000107/aera_10q022826.htm
[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0109.9569 - 13:12:32.872154 - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1605331/000166357726000107/aera_10q022826.htm
[xule.ruleDebug] http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1605331/000166357726000107/aera_10q022826.htm - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1605331/000166357726000107/aera_10q022826.htm

[DQC.US.0109.9569] The concept us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 with value 0.48 should always be used with the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis the ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis and a third axis to identify the risk area. This element can only have a value of 1 when only the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis and ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis are used. This fact needs another axis to identify the specific AERA:RevenueCustomerOneOfThreeMember risk. If this value represents the Concentration Risk, Threshold Percentage then use the extension element ConcentrationRiskThresholdPercentage.
The properties of this us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 fact are:
Period :2024-09-01 to 2025-02-28 Dimensions : us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis=AERA:RevenueCustomerOneOfThreeMember, us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis=AERA:TotalRevenueMember Unit : pure
Rule Element Id:9569 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - aera_10q022826.htm 7191

[DQC.US.0109.9569] The concept us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 with value 0.27 should always be used with the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis the ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis and a third axis to identify the risk area. This element can only have a value of 1 when only the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis and ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis are used. This fact needs another axis to identify the specific AERA:SupplierTwoOfTwoMember risk. If this value represents the Concentration Risk, Threshold Percentage then use the extension element ConcentrationRiskThresholdPercentage.
The properties of this us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 fact are:
Period :2024-09-01 to 2025-02-28 Dimensions : us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis=AERA:SupplierTotalMember, us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis=AERA:SupplierTwoOfTwoMember Unit : pure
Rule Element Id:9569 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - aera_10q022826.htm 7205

Rule Element Id:9569 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - aera_10q022826.htm 7191

Rule Element Id:9569 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - aera_10q022826.htm 7204

Period :2025-09-01 to 2026-02-28 Dimensions : us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis=AERA:AccountsReceivableCustomerTwoOfTwoMember, us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis=AERA:AccountsReceivableTotalMember Unit : pure
